title: VEYLIN Christmas Sacks Large, 2 Pack Jumbo Plastic Santa Gift Sack Bag Stocking Wrapping Decoration (56 x 36 Inch)
features: Jumbo Xmas Gift Bags: Include 2 extra large Christmas sacks, measures approx - 56 x 36inch/142 x 92cm( L X W) and have 4 name gift tags and 4 tie ribbon.

Traditional Festival Designs: 2 different Christmas designs, smile Santa face and Christmas tree are printed on the red plastic bags, the back was printed in Merry Christmas letters. Bright colors look traditional and celebration, add more strong festival atmosphere.
Super Material: The Christmas gift sack is made from premium plastic material, durable and sturdy, waterproof and fadeless, can be used repeatedly.
Practical: Easy to tighten the mouth of the bag. The gift tags are matched for the large gift bags, you can write words on the tag and the receiver can distinguish the gift easily.

Wide Applications: The plastic Santa sacks are great for massive of toys, presents, Christmas tree, gift boxes, that make wrapping present super easy. Storing Christmas gifts in this giant bag will give children more surprise.
description: Product Description VEYLIN 2 Pack Jumno Christmas Gift Bags for Holiday Party Present Wrapping Decorations with Name Tags and Ties (56 x 36Inch) Why Choose VEYLIN Jumbo Christmas Gift Bags? Traditional and Festival: VEYLIN 2 pieces jumbo Christmas gift bag that features 2 different Christmas designs, smile Santa face and cute Christmas tree are printed on the red plastic bags, the back was printed in Merry Christmas letters. Bright colors look traditional and celebration, add more strong festival atmosphere Package Include: Include 2 jumbo Christmas gift bags, 2 gift name tags, 4 red ropes Durable Material: Made of premium plastic material, durable and sturdy, waterproof, can be used repeatedly Practical Gift Tags: Easy to tighten the mouth of the bag.
